papers.title: Reading and writing neural activity with Neuropixels Opto probes
papers.abstract: High-density electrophysiology devices allow neuroscientists to observe spikes from large populations of neurons, and optogenetics allows them to drive or suppress those spikes. We show that a single device can combine these two capabilities, providing a high-resolution means to both read and write neural activity in the living brain.
papers.titleZh: Neuropixels Opto探針：讀寫神經活動的新方法
papers.summaryZh: 高密度電生理學裝置能夠同時觀測大量神經元的放電活動，而光遺傳學則可精確驅動或抑制這些放電。本研究展示了一種整合兩種功能的單一裝置——Neuropixels Opto探針，實現了在活體大腦中同步讀寫神經活動的高解析度工具。該技術突破彌合了觀測與操控之間的鴻溝，為研究神經迴路的因果關係提供了前所未有的手段。此外，該平台的可擴展性與兼容性將加速各種神經科學實驗的發展，並有助於開發更精準的神經疾病治療策略。

papers.title: Neuropixels Opto: combining high-resolution electrophysiology and optogenetics
papers.abstract: High-resolution extracellular electrophysiology is the gold standard for recording spikes from distributed neural populations and is especially powerful when combined with optogenetics for manipulation of specific cell types with high temporal resolution. We integrated these approaches into prototype Neuropixels Opto probes, which combine electronic and photonic circuits. These devices pack 960 electrical recording sites and two sets of 14 light emitters onto a 70-μm-wide, 1-cm-long shank, allowing spatially addressable optogenetic stimulation with blue and red light. In mouse cortex, Neuropixels Opto probes delivered high-quality recordings together with spatially addressable optogenetics, differentially activating or silencing neurons at distinct cortical depths. In the mouse striatum and other deep structures, Neuropixels Opto probes delivered efficient optotagging, facilitating the identification of two cell types in parallel. Neuropixels Opto probes represent a promising tool for recording, identifying and manipulating neuronal populations. Neuropixels Opto probes combine high-density recording sites with optical waveguide-based light emission sites for simultaneous recording of neuronal activity and optogenetic stimulation with blue and/or red light. As demonstrated in the mouse brain, these probes allow the activation or silencing of defined groups of neurons while acquiring high-quality recordings.
papers.titleZh: 神經像素光電探針：結合高解析度電生理學與光遺傳學
papers.summaryZh: 高解析度細胞外電生理學是記錄分散神經群體活動的黃金標準，若能結合光遺傳學技術，更可對特定細胞類型進行高時間解析度的操控。本研究開發的Neuropixels Opto探針創新性地整合電子與光子電路，在僅70微米寬、1公分長的探針上排列960個記錄位點及兩組14個發光元件，可同時使用藍光與紅光進行空間可尋址的光遺傳學刺激。在小鼠皮質實驗中，該探針能於不同皮質深度差異性地活化或抑制神經元；在紋狀體等深部結構中則可進行高效的光標記，實現同時識別兩種細胞類型。這項技術為神經科學研究提供了同步記錄、識別與操控神經元群體的强大工具。

papers.title: Age identifies cancer drivers hidden within the genome
papers.abstract: As tissues age, mutant clones carrying driver mutations expand, yet the abundance of these variants in normal tissues suggests that fitness-based selection is often uncoupled from malignancy. Cheek et al. introduce a framework that disentangles clonal success from true carcinogenic potential, showing that fitness and fate are not synonymous.
papers.titleZh: 年齡可識別隱藏於基因組中的癌症驅動因子
papers.summaryZh: 隨著組織老化，攜帶驅動突變的突變克隆會擴增，但正常組織中這些變異的高豐富度顯示，基於適應度的選擇往往與惡性腫瘤無關。Cheek等人提出一個新框架，可區分克隆成功與真正的致癌潛力，表明適應度與命運並非同義詞。這項研究有助於更準確地識別真正的癌症驅動因子，避免對老化組織中常見的良性克隆擴增進行過度診斷，對癌症早期檢測和風險評估具有重要意義。

papers.title: Publisher Correction: Multi-ancestry genome-wide association analyses of refractive error augment genetic discovery and polygenic prediction
Decoding the origins of cellular self-organization for engineered biology
papers.abstract: This Perspective positions cellular self-organization as a foundational principle for the origin of multicellular life and discusses how decoding this concept with stem cell-based models will advance biological engineering.
papers.titleZh: 解碼細胞自組織原理：邁向工程生物學新紀元
papers.summaryZh: 細胞自組織是多細胞生命起源的關鍵原則。本篇觀點文章深入探討如何解碼這一基本原理，並強調以幹細胞模型為核心的研究方法。透過理解細胞如何自發性地組織成複雜結構，科學家可望為生物工程開闢全新途徑。這種跨學科視角結合演化生物學與合成生物學的洞見，對於設計新型生物系統具有深遠意義。

papers.title: Selection of human hematopoietic stem cells bearing the intended functional edit by transient AND-gate reporters
papers.abstract: Selection increases the purity of blood stem cells bearing targeted homologous recombination.
papers.titleZh: 利用短暫AND閘選擇功能性編輯造血幹細胞
papers.summaryZh: 本研究開發了一種利用短暫AND閘報導基因來篩選人類造血幹細胞中正確進行同源重組編輯的方法。該技術能顯著提升編輯細胞的純度，對基因治療應用至關重要。報導基因的短暫性確保其不會殘留於最終產品中，解決了安全性疑慮。這項進展克服了血球幹細胞基因治療的關鍵挑戰，為血液遺傳疾病的治療帶來新希望。

papers.title: Diffusing caveolin-1 scaffolds regulate mechanosignalling
papers.abstract: Caveolae are invaginated plasma membrane nanodomains traditionally associated with membrane trafficking and signalling. These multifunctional organelles are also essential mechanosensors mediating the cell response to mechanical stress. We investigated the role of caveolae mechanics in regulating various signalling pathways. Single-molecule imaging and super-resolution microscopy revealed that mechanical stress rapidly triggers caveolae disassembly and the release of caveolin-1 scaffolds, which then exhibit enhanced diffusion at the plasma membrane. This promoted direct interaction between the caveolin-1 scaffolding domain and the tyrosine kinase JAK1, leading to the inhibition of its catalytic activity. A similar process was observed for eNOS, PTEN and PTP1B. The control of signalling by diffusing Cav1 scaffolds was further validated by a theoretical model based on caveolae thermodynamics. These findings establish a mechanotransduction paradigm in which signalling information is decoded remotely from the initial mechanosensing caveola, through dynamic and reversible assembly of tension-controlled complexes between signalling effectors and caveolin-1 scaffolds. Mani, Tardif, Rossier et al. show that mechanical stress triggers caveolin-1 release from caveolae, enabling its diffusion in the plasma membrane and interaction with signalling effectors to regulate intracellular signalling.
papers.titleZh: 擴散的小窩蛋白-1支架調控機械信號傳導
papers.summaryZh: 小窩（caveolae）是細胞膜上的重要機械感測器。本研究發現，機械應力會快速觸發小窩分解，釋放出小窩蛋白-1（caveolin-1）支架，使其在細胞膜上擴散增強。這些擴散的支架能與JAK1等多種訊號分子直接相互作用，進而調控其活性。研究團隊建立了一套基於小窩熱力學的理論模型，證實此機制為一種新型的機械傳導範式，透過張力控制的動態複合體組裝，將機械刺激遠程轉換為生化訊號。

papers.title: Developmental chronology of mouse embryo from 2-cell stage through birth
papers.abstract: Cao, Lin, Feng, Chen, Wu and colleagues develop a mouse developmental single-cell atlas covering 2-cell stage through to birth.
papers.titleZh: 小鼠胚胎發育時序圖譜：從2細胞期到出生
papers.summaryZh: 本研究由Cao、Lin、Feng、Chen、Wu等人攜手合作，構建了涵蓋小鼠從2細胞期到出生完整發育歷程的單細胞圖譜。此圖譜以單細胞解析度呈現胚胎發育的動態變化，為研究哺乳類發育生物學提供了前所未有的資源。透過這份全面的細胞發育藍圖，科學家能更深入理解細胞命運決定與組織形成的分子調控機制。此研究成果不僅推動基礎發育生物學的發展，也為相關疾病研究與再生醫學應用奠定重要基礎。

papers.title: Segmental specification of the human female fetal reproductive tract revealed by spatiotemporal dynamics
papers.abstract: He, Wang, Ding and colleagues report a transcriptomic atlas of human female reproductive tract segments from fetuses at gestational weeks 10 to 25.
papers.titleZh: 人類女性胎兒生殖道發育的區段特化時空圖譜
papers.summaryZh: 本研究建立了人類女性胎兒生殖道（妊娠第10至25週）的轉錄體圖譜，揭示了生殖道不同區段在發育過程中的特化時空動態。這些發現對於理解女性生殖道的正常發育至關重要，並可為先天性生殖道發育異常的機制提供重要線索。此圖譜也為日後研究生殖系統相關疾病的發育起源奠定了基礎。

papers.title: Emerging roles of ferroptosis in modulating the immune landscape of glial tumours
papers.abstract: This Review discusses the roles of ferroptosis in shaping the immune landscape in glial tumours and highlights potential strategies that combine ferroptosis induction with immunotherapy for a durable control of gliomas.
papers.titleZh: 鐵死亡調控膠質瘤免疫微環境的新興角色
papers.summaryZh: 膠質瘤是高度惡性且難以治療的腦部腫瘤，傳統療法往往效果有限。本綜述探討了鐵死亡——這種依賴鐵離子的新型細胞死亡方式——如何塑造膠質瘤的免疫微環境。研究指出，誘導鐵死亡可與免疫治療產生協同效應，為膠質瘤的持久控制開闢新途徑。這種結合策略可能突破現有治療瓶頸，為患者帶來新的治療希望。

papers.title: T owards a holistic understanding of pain in the biomarker age
papers.abstract: Pain biomarkers cannot prove or disprove another person’s pain, but they need not be rejected as futile or reductionist. When developed within a bio-psycho-social framework and guided by epistemic humility and ethical safeguards, they can complement and enrich the voices of those living with pain rather than replace them.
papers.titleZh: 邁向生物標記時代的整體性疼痛理解
papers.summaryZh: 疼痛生物標記無法確切證明或否定一個人的疼痛經歷，但研究顯示這不代表它們應該被完全否定。本論文主張在「生物-心理-社會」整合框架下開發疼痛生物標記，並強調需具備認知謙遜與倫理防護機制。如此一來，生物標記可作為輔助工具，豐富疼痛患者的主觀敘事，而非取代臨床判斷或病患的聲音。這項觀點對未來精準醫療時代的疼痛管理與診斷具有重要參考價值。

papers.title: Why pain biomarkers cannot replace the patient experience
papers.abstract: Using neuroimaging to understand the mechanisms of pain is an important task. But we must understand that the gold standard of measuring pain will always be the self-report.
papers.titleZh: 為何疼痛生物標記無法取代患者主觀體驗
papers.summaryZh: 神經影像技術的發展讓科學家能更深入探索疼痛的神經機制，但本研究強調，自我報告仍是測量疼痛的黃金標準。生物標記雖然能提供客觀數據，卻無法完全捕捉患者主觀感受到的疼痛強度和情緒影響。這項發現對疼痛研究與臨床實踐具有重要啟示，提醒醫療人員在評估疼痛時應優先聆聽患者自身描述，而非過度依賴技術檢測。

papers.title: Deep brain stimulation induces white matter remodeling and functional changes to brain-wide networks
papers.abstract: Deep brain stimulation (DBS) is an emerging therapy for treatment-resistant neurological and psychiatric disorders. Despite this, little is known about the anatomical and functional mechanisms that underlie this therapy. We targeted DBS to white matter adjacent to the subcallosal anterior cingulate cortex (SCC-DBS) in macaques, modeling the approach proven effective for depression in humans. SCC-DBS caused a selective increase in fractional anisotropy, linked to white matter microstructure, in the cingulum bundle. At the cellular level, this was associated with an increase in both myelinated oligodendrocytes and the degree of myelination in the mid-cingulum bundle. SCC-DBS also altered brain-wide functional connectivity, changing interactions between the SCC and multiple brain networks, most notably the default mode network that has been implicated in depression. Overall, our data indicate that white matter remodeling as well as selective changes in multiple brain networks may contribute to DBS’s therapeutic efficacy. In a nonhuman primate model, Fujimoto et al. show that deep brain stimulation promotes white matter remodeling and reorganizes brain-wide functional networks, detailing a mechanism through which this neuromodulation therapy may treat depression.
papers.titleZh: 深層腦刺激促進白質重塑並重組全腦功能網絡
papers.summaryZh: 深層腦刺激已成為治療頑固性神經與精神疾病的新興療法，但其作用機制仍不清楚。本研究以獼猴為模型，針對膝下前扣帶皮質鄰近的白質進行刺激，發現深層腦刺激能選擇性增加扣帶束的_fractional anisotropy_，反映白質顯微結構的改善。進一步分析顯示，刺激促進了髓鞘化少突膠質細胞數量及髓鞘化程度的提升。在功能層面，深層腦刺激也重組了全腦網絡的互動模式，特別影響了與情緒調節密切相關的預設模式網絡。本研究為深層腦刺激治療憂鬱症等疾病的療效提供了重要的神經生物學解釋。

papers.title: Editorial Expression of Concern: DOCK8 functions as an adaptor that links TLR-MyD88 signaling to B cell activation
papers.abstract: Editorial Expression of Concern: DOCK8 functions as an adaptor that links TLR-MyD88 signaling to B cell activation

papers.title: Regulatory factor X 7 limits Myc activity during B cell activation and suppresses Myc-dependent lymphomagenesis
papers.abstract: Guarda and colleagues investigate the role of the transcription factor RFX7 in B cell activation and lymphomagenesis. The findings indicate that Rfx7 regulates germinal center B cell, plasmablast generation and malignant transformation by restricting Myc activity.
papers.titleZh: 調節因子X 7在B細胞活化期間限制Myc活性並抑制依賴Myc的淋巴瘤生成

papers.title: Dysbiosis and succession in the scientific infobiome
papers.abstract: The scientific information ecosystem is dysbiotic, but the conditions for ecological succession towards a more diverse, inclusive and resilient ‘infobiome’ are present. Scientists, institutions and platform builders should act together.

papers.title: Engineered Bacteroides thetaiotaomicron sense gut inflammation and deliver therapeutic molecules to alleviate colitis in mice
papers.abstract: Engineered Bacteroides thetaiotaomicron, Btbots, use a genetic AND circuit to sense nitric oxide and deoxycholic acid as inflammatory signal in the gut to release therapeutic molecules, TFF3 and IL-35, that alleviate colitis in mice.
papers.titleZh: 經基因工程改造的類梭桿菌感知腸道發炎並傳遞治療分子以緩解小鼠結腸炎

papers.title: Ultra-efficient High Resolution 3D Reconstruction of Spatial Omics Data with Neural Transcriptomic Field
papers.abstract: Biological tissues are inherently three-dimensional (3D) ecosystems where spatial architecture dictates cellular function. While spatial omics technologies have revolutionized molecular profiling, they are largely restricted to isolated two-dimensional (2D) tissue sections. Existing computational methods attempting to reconstruct 3D volumes from sparse slices rely heavily on local slice-to-slice interpolation, struggling to balance high-fidelity reconstruction, noise reduction, and atlas-scale efficiency. Here, we present Neural Transcriptomic Field (NTF), a deep learning framework employing multi-resolution hash-grid encoding and implicit neural representations. Unlike interpolation-based approaches that merely bridge adjacent observations, NTF learns a global, continuous 3D representation of the tissue. By modeling the underlying latent biological patterns, NTF intrinsically decouples true molecular signals from technical artifacts, naturally enabling robust denoising and high-fidelity reconstructions. This global field paradigm shatters traditional scalability limits: NTF achieves up to a 1,000x speedup over existing methods, notably reconstructing a 100-million-cell scale 3D whole-mouse embryo atlas in under 15 minutes. Furthermore, NTF can generate super-resolved volumes from sparse input (e.g., utilizing only 10% of slices) and robustly extrapolating into unseen tissue regions. We demonstrate NTF's versatility across diverse transcriptomic and proteomic datasets, capturing complex spatiotemporal dynamics in Drosophila and mouse embryogenesis, and mapping intra-tumoral functional gradients in human breast cancer. Ultimately, NTF provides an unprecedentedly fast, scalable, and robust computational engine for constructing the next generation of comprehensive 3D tissue atlases.
papers.titleZh: 使用神經轉錄體學欄位進行超高效率高解析度空間基因體學資料3D重建

papers.title: Development positions malignant cellular states but does notexplain their diversification
papers.abstract: Epithelial cancers are often described as aberrant reactivations of embryonic or tissue-forming programs, but whether malignant cellular-state diversification is actually constrained by developmental trajectories remains unclear. Here, we present a quantitative framework to test this idea in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC). Using representation learning on large-scale single-cell data, we build a reference space that captures the main axes of normal foregut and pancreatic epithelial variation. Malignant cells can be mapped into this space, showing that developmental biology helps interpret their identity. However, these coordinates account for only part of the variation. A substantial portion lay outside the reference space, and the residual component was structured rather than diffuse. Furthermore, displacements between cancer states showed weak alignment with canonical axes and did not correspond to simple progression along them, even when they retained measurable components within the broader subspace. Thus, developmental programs offer a useful coordinate system for describing where PDAC states sit relative to normal epithelia, but they do not explain the directions along which malignant states differ. Instead, malignant diversification follows additional structured, cancer-adaptive axes outside the dominant geometry of normal development. More generally, these results demonstrate how disease-state variation can be decomposed into shared coordinates of normal identity and distinct directions of pathological reprogramming.
papers.titleZh: 發育定位惡性細胞狀態但無法解釋其多樣化

papers.title: Passive heart-rate monitoring during smartphone use in everyday life
papers.abstract: Resting heart rate (RHR) is a key biomarker of cardiovascular health and mortality1–3, but passively tracking it longitudinally generally requires a wearable device, limiting its availability. Here we present passive heart-rate monitoring (PHRM), a deep-learning system that uses facial video-based photoplethysmography for passive measurements of heart rate (HR) and RHR during everyday smartphone interactions. Our system was developed using 192,353 videos from 485 participants and validated on 162,546 videos from 211 participants in laboratory and free-living conditions, representing, to our knowledge, the largest validation study of its kind. PHRM outperformed state-of-the-art methods on our benchmarks. Compared with reference electrocardiograms, PHRM achieved a mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) lower than 10% for HR measurements across three skin-tone groups of light, medium and dark pigmentation, meeting industry accuracy standards; MAPE for each skin-tone group was non-inferior versus the others. Daily RHR measured by PHRM had a mean absolute error of less than five beats per minute, compared with a wearable HR tracker, and was associated with known risk factors for cardiovascular disease. These results highlight the potential of smartphones for enabling passive and equitable monitoring of heart health. To facilitate further research, we publicly release a large, annotated smartphone video dataset along with a pre-trained HR model. A machine-learning model that uses smartphone cameras to measure heart rate in the background during normal daily phone use and subsequently estimate resting heart rate could make it easier for people to monitor heart health.

papers.title: Robust projections of risks to the Amazon rainforest
papers.abstract: Amazonian deforestation is altering atmospheric moisture transport; as a result, even low levels of global warming could trigger dieback of most of the remaining forest.

papers.title: Smartphone camera takes users’ pulse passively during device use
papers.abstract: Smartphone users’ heart rate and resting heart rate can be estimated across the skin-tone spectrum.

papers.title: Landmark cancer trial shows success against ‘undruggable’ cancer — raising hopes for future treatments
papers.abstract: Unprecedented results against a stubbornly hard-to-treat cancer are boosting optimism that other challenging tumours will be next.

papers.title: Climate and regional plant richness drive diet specialization in butterfly caterpillars
papers.abstract: Insect herbivores vary in how many kinds of plants they eat, but we know little about broad patterns of feeding behaviour. Here, global data shows that butterflies living with more plant families have narrower diets, while those on islands have broader diets.
papers.titleZh: 氣候與區域植物豐富度驅動蝴蝶幼蟲的飲食特化

papers.title: Population-specific heterogeneity in ontogeny of the broadly-conserved blood transcriptional program during the first week of life
papers.abstract: This study compares immune development (ie. ontogeny) in healthy newborns across two distinct populations, revealing differences on top of a strong core pattern of development. These differences can inform the influence of genetic or environmental factors on newborn immunity
papers.titleZh: 生命第一週廣泛保守血液轉錄程式的個體發育具有族群特異性異質性

paper.title: Enantioselective hydrogen atom relay via non-covalent catalyst assembly
Can Polymarket predict the progress of science, or are subject-experts better?
Science fiction: nine lab-life novels for your holiday reading
Why it’s time to bin recommendation letters in science job applications
Poor supervision is pushing young researchers out of academia
Feynmann's solved ‘restaurant dilemma’ 50 years ago — now a study confirms his mathematics
Buried-interface homogenization by asymmetric polymeric self-assembled layers powers efficient, durable flexible perovskite photovoltaics
paper.abstract: Here, the authors present a polymeric interface that enhances the efficiency and stability of perovskite solar cells, enabling durable large-area flexible modules and high efficiency in rigid and tandem devices.

paper.title: Controlling an altermagnetic spin density wave in the kagome magnet CsCr3Sb5
paper.abstract: CsCr3Sb5 is part of a family of Kagome materials noted for hosting a rich variety of emergent phases. Here, using scanning tunnelling microscopy and spectroscopy, Huang, Xu, Que, Liu and coauthors find two charge density wave orders, intertwined with a tuneable altermagnetic spin density wave order.

paper.title: Delayed cation dynamics enables dual-doped organic electrochemical transistors with high current sensitivity
Quantum critical behavior of cuprate superconductors observed by inelastic X-ray scattering
paper.abstract: The authors present resonant inelastic X-ray scattering measurements of the cuprate superconductor La2−xSrxCuO4, observing a quantum-critical scaling collapse. From the critical exponent, they argue that the symmetry of the quantum critical point is enlarged from O(2) to O(4), implying that orders beyond just the charge density wave participate.

paper.title: Demonstrating real-time and low-latency quantum error correction with superconducting qubits
paper.abstract: The authors report real-time quantum error correction on Rigetti’s Ankaa-2 by integrating a scalable FPGA decoder into the control stack achieving sub-1 μs mean decoding per round and 9.6 us feedback latency. This work provides a concrete advancement on scalable fault-tolerant computing

paper.title: Decoupling of hygromechanical stimuli without cross-interference enabled by distinct ion-electron charge transport
paper.abstract: Accurately decoupling mechanical stimuli and environmental factors such as humidity remains a challenge for tactile sensors. Here, the authors show distinct ion–electron charge transport kinetics, enabling cross-interference-free hygromechanical sensing for safer, adaptive human–machine interaction in robotic systems.
